sacco

Class Card

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.Card

  • public class Card
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Card()
      Constructs a Card with both its value and suit completely randomized
      Card(java.lang.String str)
      Takes in a two character String and sets the value and suit accordingly.
      Card(java.lang.String v, java.lang.String s)
      Takes in a String for value (full word or just the character) and a String for the suit, and constructs the corresponding Card.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean equals(Card c)
      returns true if the parameter card has the same value and suit as the current card
      int getRank() 
      java.lang.String getSuit()
      returns the suit of the Card
      java.lang.String getValue()
      returns the value of the Card
      java.lang.String toString()
      returns a String that represents the Card in the form "Ace of Spades"
      java.lang.String twoCharString()
      returns the two-character representation of the Card

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Card

        public Card(java.lang.String str)
        Takes in a two character String and sets the value and suit accordingly. For example: new Card("AS") would produce an Ace of Spades
        Parameters:
        str -

      • Card

        public Card()
        Constructs a Card with both its value and suit completely randomized

      • Card

        public Card(java.lang.String v,
    java.lang.String s)
        Takes in a String for value (full word or just the character) and a String for the suit, and constructs the corresponding Card.
        Parameters:
        v - - The value String
        s - - The suit String

    • Method Detail

      • getRank

        public int getRank()

      • getSuit

        public java.lang.String getSuit()
        returns the suit of the Card
        Returns:
        the suit

      • getValue

        public java.lang.String getValue()
        returns the value of the Card
        Returns:
        the value

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        returns a String that represents the Card in the form "Ace of Spades"
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object

      • equals

        public boolean equals(Card c)
        returns true if the parameter card has the same value and suit as the current card
        Parameters:
        c - the Card to be checked
        Returns:

      • twoCharString

        public java.lang.String twoCharString()
        returns the two-character representation of the Card
